pharma.title: Bernstein initiates coverage on 6 pharma stocks, cites 3 major tailwinds for healthcare sector
pharma.summary: Bernstein has initiated coverage on six Indian pharma stocks, with Zydus Lifesciences as its top choice. The brokerage sees strong future growth for the Indian healthcare sector. Key drivers include AI-led innovation, incremental advancements in niche areas,...
pharma.thbAction: Use the article as an entry point to pitch THB's commercial visibility layer for territory planning, account prioritization, and next-best-action for pharma leadership teams.

providers.title: Fortis Healthcare Q4 Profit Jumps 44% as Hospital Business Drives FY26 Growth
providers.summary: Fortis Healthcare reported double-digit growth in revenue and profit for FY26, backed by higher occupied beds, growth in robotic surgeries and radiation therapy, and expansion across key healthcare clusters including Bengaluru, Punjab, and Delhi NCR.
providers.thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.

providers.title: Apollo Hospitals post ₹6,605 cr in Q4 FY26, net profit climbs 36%
providers.summary: For the full financial year FY26, consolidated revenue grew 16 per cent YoY to Rs 25,229 crore with a net profit of Rs 1,942 crore.
providers.thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.

providers.title: Paras Health unveils 'Umeed ke Sitare' initiative for cancer survivors
providers.summary: The program brought together cancer survivors, caregivers, oncologists, and healthcare professionals to celebrate stories of hope and perseverance while highlighting the emotional and psychological aspects of cancer recovery.
providers.thbAction: Map the news to THB's provider CRM for referral growth, patient lifecycle engagement, and multi-facility relationship management across hospital and provider networks.

providers.title: Cloudnine to acquire Apollo’s maternity chain Cradle
providers.summary: Cloudnine has signed an exclusivity agreement to acquire Apollo Cradle and the proposed transaction is expected to value the business at around ₹1,500 crore. Earlier in June last year, ET first reported that Apollo Hospitals Enterprises Ltd (AHEL) had...

providers.title: HCG opens new Bengaluru facility with Rs 129 crore investment
providers.summary: The 132-bed facility in Hebbal takes HCG's hospital count in the city to three. It uses advanced MRI scanner machines that combine high-quality imaging with a linear accelerator for precise, adaptive cancer treatment, said the chain in a statement.

providers.title: Max Healthcare to set up 712-bed facility in Lucknow for ₹1,400 cr
providers.summary: The planned project will be the company’s second hospital in the city and is expected to be commissioned in FY30.

diagnostics.title: MedGenome acquires majority stake in SDRC to expand integrated diagnostics footprint
diagnostics.summary: ​​​Founded in 1995, the network operates five centres , offering services including MRI, CT, X-ray, sonography, mammography and cardiac investigations. The promoters will continue to lead operations.
diagnostics.thbAction: Pitch THB's diagnostics CRM to help labs manage doctor outreach, collection-center expansion, and B2B referral relationships while improving conversion and retention.

diagnostics.title: PGI combines AI and ultrasound for early gallbladder cancer detection
diagnostics.summary: The model’s diagnostic accuracy was successfully verified using patient data collected from four major hospitals across north India.
